Lifeism has a [[discord]] server.

It is intended as the first place to implement the [[lambda covenant]]

[https://discord.gg/swv7gz7ZEK Here is a link]

== Rules ==
The rules of the discord server are simply the rules of the [[Omega covenant]] with people are required to agree to them to enter the server

* [[Commandment Omega Omega|don’t kill]]

* [[Commandment Omega Lambda|don’t deprive of immortality]] 

* [[Commandment Omega Alpha|don’t spread hatred]]

All of these have their own unique interpretations, although some are more significant then others

=== Omega Omega ===
If you murder someone you'll be banned from the server. This is not up for debate and you can't appeal your ban. 

=== Omega Lambda ===
If you cause particular issues for the server it can be banned at moderator discretion. No brigading or scamming for example

=== Omega Alpha ===

* Don't spread hatred

This is the most practically important commandment

* No homophobic advocacy or other hate toward vulnerable groups
* No hatred towards non vulnerable groups. Hatred is what we're banning, not bigotry
* Don't do activities which fracture the identity of the server, for example double standards on who can use the n-word, if one person can't do something then nobody can
** Nobody has a race on this server, we're all people ([[Ubuntu]])
* Intellectual discussion even of a very serious and controversial manner is allowed in designated channels
** This may be changed to in threads so that nobody gets a panic attack seeing a notification where someone is debating apartheid or whatever

== Channels and history ==
[[File:Lifeism discord channels 2022.jpeg|thumb]]
[[Category:Evolutionist Online Infrastructure]]
[[sn:Catgirl Army discord server]][[Category:Discord]]
[[sn:Catgirl Army discord server]]The server is rather small with a limited number of channels designed to ensure all channels are active.

* general
** straightforward
* memes
** straightforward
* current events
** One of the oldest channels. Has the [[owlbot]] on it. One of the first messages was the announcement of the Ukraine war
* Catgirl philosophy
** was originally called research discussion and used to discuss scientific papers
** Then renamed to socratic dialogue
** then renamed to catgirl philosophy

=== Dec 30 Raid ===
The first raid happened on December 30[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
